name: kotlin
description: Language Support for Kotlin by JetBrains
author: JetBrains

intellij.dev.serverPort.description: Port for the locally started server to listen on. -1 to start the bundled server

intellij.additionalJvmArgs.description: Additional JVM arguments to pass to the LSP server

intellij.buildTool.description: A build tool to use for a server, workspace, folder (null = any, "" = none)

intellij.jdkForSymbolResolution.description: Path of the JDK for symbol resolution

intellij.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the language server.

jetbrains.kotlin.hints.settings.types.pr.description: Show inlay hints for property types

jetbrains.kotlin.hints.settings.types.va.description: Show inlay hints for local variable types

jetbrains.kotlin.hints.type.function.ret.description: Show inlay hints for function return types

jetbrains.kotlin.hints.type.function.par.description: Show inlay hints for function parameter types

jetbrains.kotlin.hints.settings.lambda.r.description: Show inlay hints for return expressions

jetbrains.kotlin.hints.lambda.receivers..description: Show inlay hints for implicit receivers and parameters

jetbrains.kotlin.hints.value.kotlin.time.description: Show kotlin.time package warning inlay hints

jetbrains.kotlin.hints.call.chains.description: Function return type in call chains

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run package && npm run unpack-server
scripts.unpack-server: rm -rf server && mkdir -p server && case "$LSP_ZIP_PATH" in *.tar.gz) tar -xzf "$LSP_ZIP_PATH" --strip-components=1 -C server ;; *.zip) unzip -q -o -- "$LSP_ZIP_PATH" -d server ;; *.sit) mkdir server.tmp && unzip -q -o -- "$LSP_ZIP_PATH" -d server.tmp && rmdir server && mv server.tmp/* server && rm -rf server.tmp ;; *) echo "Unsupported archive type: $LSP_ZIP_PATH"; exit 1 ;; esac
